info.name: Adobe Experience Cloud Adobe Campaign API
info.description:
The Adobe Campaign API provides RESTful access to Adobe Campaign Standard and Classic capabilities for managing marketing campaigns, profiles, services, workflows, transactional messages, and content. It enables programmatic creation and execution of email, SMS, and push notification campaigns, subscriber management, and real-time transactional messaging.

Contact Support:
 Name: Adobe Developer

item.name: campaign
profileAndServices
profile
{profilePKey}
Adobe Campaign Adobe Experience Cloud Get a Profile

variable.description: (Required) The primary key of the profile.

request.description: Retrieves a single subscriber profile by its primary key (PKey), including all standard and custom attributes.

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: bearer
Added as a part of security scheme: bearer

item.name: Adobe Campaign Adobe Experience Cloud Update a Profile

request.description: Updates specific attributes of an existing subscriber profile using a partial update. Only the fields provided in the request body will be modified.

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: bearer
Added as a part of security scheme: bearer

item.name: Adobe Campaign Adobe Experience Cloud Delete a Profile

request.description: Permanently deletes a subscriber profile from the Adobe Campaign database. This action cannot be undone.

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: bearer
Added as a part of security scheme: bearer

item.name: Adobe Campaign Adobe Experience Cloud List Profiles

query.description: Maximum number of profiles to return per page.

request.description: Returns a paginated list of subscriber profiles in the Adobe Campaign database. Profiles can be filtered by email, first name, last name, and custom attributes using query parameters.

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: bearer

query.description: Maximum number of profiles to return per page.

response.name: Authentication credentials are missing or invalid.

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: bearer

query.description: Maximum number of profiles to return per page.

item.name: Adobe Campaign Adobe Experience Cloud Create a Profile

request.description: Creates a new subscriber profile in the Adobe Campaign database with the provided attributes including email, first name, last name, and any custom fields.

response.name: Profile with this email already exists.

item.name: Adobe Campaign Adobe Experience Cloud List Services

item.name: workflow
{workflowPKey}
commands
Adobe Campaign Adobe Experience Cloud Execute a Workflow Command

request.description: Executes a command on a workflow such as start, pause, resume, or stop. The command triggers the corresponding state transition in the workflow execution engine.

response.name: Invalid command for the current workflow state.

request.description: Retrieves the details of a single workflow by its primary key, including its activities, transitions, and execution history.

item.name: Adobe Campaign Adobe Experience Cloud List Workflows

Adobe Campaign Adobe Experience Cloud Get Transactional Message Status

variable.description: (Required) The event ID returned when the message was triggered.

request.description: Retrieves the delivery status of a previously sent transactional message by its event ID.

item.name: Adobe Campaign Adobe Experience Cloud Send a Transactional Message

request.description: Triggers a real-time transactional message to a recipient. Transactional messages are used for event-driven communications such as order confirmations, password resets, and shipping notifications.
